pageContext.name: Darth Maul 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: A former Sith Lord™ and a skilled warrior in his own right, Darth Maul™ wanted nothing but to defeat Obi-wan Kenobi™ and see the Jedi Empire™ fall.   Made from 1oz pure silver, this thrilling coin has been shaped and colored to represent Maul™ as Chibi art. It showcases him with his notable Dathomirian™ like features and donning a black undertunic. To confirm it is legal tender, the obverse bears the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II.   The coin is officially licensed and arrives in a custom-designed box that includes striking images of Maul and a large window for display. A Certificate of Authenticity is printed on the back of the box, along with coin's unique number in the mintage of 2,000.   Attack now to own one of these thrilling limited-edition pieces!
